title: Tips on leveraging AI for empirical research
summary: Tips on leveraging AI for empirical research
whyItMatters: Tl;dr I've been thinking hard and experimenting with how to best take advantage of AI for my work. I've developed some practices, mostly through trial and error. These have helped me spend less effort doing work while getting more done, and so I'm writing them up to share them. A couple disclaimers: I've tried to optimise for my personal circumstances and t…
